alt: Moorish idol using its long tubular snout to pick encrusting sponges off a reef head
caption: Using their specialized tubular snouts, they selectively graze on encrusting sponges, tunicates, and benthic invertebrates.
acquisitionNotes: Action shot showing native dietary foraging behavior along the reef substrate. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/c/c3/%C3%8Ddolo_moro_%28Zanclus_cornutus%29%2C_Anilao%2C_Filipinas%2C_2023-08-22%2C_DD_188.jpg
